title: limnanthemum aquaticum
intro: Limnanthemum aquaticum, also known as the floating blue water lily or blue water hyssop, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family that thrives in aquatic environments. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce fever and inflammation, making it a popular remedy for treating various health conditions. Its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Limnanthemum aquaticum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
